MODEL: PLD
  Organization: NVIDIA GEAR Lab
  Date: 2025-10-30
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.00091
  Code: None
  Venue: ReALM-GEN Workshop @ ICLR 2026
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: plug-and-play residual RL framework (probe вҶ’ learn вҶ’ distill back to generalist)
    Backbone: varies (wraps existing VLAs)
    LLM: varies (wraps existing VLAs)
    Parameters: varies (applied on top of existing VLAs)
  Tags: residual-RL, probe-learn-distill, post-training, ICLR-2026-workshop
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=99.0): libero_avg=99.0
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'RL post-trained', 'simpler_env': 'RL post-trained'}
  AI Review Summary: Probe-Learn-Distill (PLD) 3лӢЁкі„ н”„л Ҳмһ„мӣҢнҒ¬лЎң, residual RLлЎң VLAмқҳ мӢӨнҢЁ мҳҒм—ӯмқ„ нғҗмғү(probe)н•ҳкі , hybrid rolloutмңјлЎң лҚ°мқҙн„°лҘј мҲҳм§‘(learn)н•ҳл©°, мқҙлҘј лӢӨмӢң supervised FTлЎң м •м ң(distill)н•ҳм—¬ LIBERO 99% лӢ¬м„ұ.
  AI Review: Abstract-based

MODEL: SimpleVLA-RL
  Organization: Shanghai Jiao Tong University / Peking University / Shanghai AI Lab / HKU
  Date: 2025-09-11
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.09674
  Code: https://github.com/PRIME-RL/SimpleVLA-RL
  Venue: ICLR 2026
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: autoregressive + GRPO reinforcement learning
    Backbone: PrismaticVLM (SigLIP + DinoV2)
    LLM: Llama-2 7B
    Parameters: 7B
  Inference: 10 Hz
  Tags: 7B, RL, GRPO, reinforcement-learning, ICLR-2026, open-source, SOTA, data-efficient
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=98.83): libero_spatial=99.1, libero_object=99.2, libero_goal=98.5, libero_long=98.5
    robotwin_v1 (avg=70.4): hammer_beat=92.6, block_handover=89.6, blocks_stack=40.2, shoe_place=59.3, average=70.4
    robotwin_v2 (avg=68.8): short_horizon=64.9, medium_horizon=72.5, long_horizon=69.0, average=68.8
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'RL fine-tuned (on top of SFT)', 'robotwin_v1': 'RL fine-tuned', 'robotwin_v2': 'RL fine-tuned'}
  Peer Review:
    Venue: ICLR 2026, Decision: poster
    Review Avg: 7.5, Confidence: 4.25

MODEL: VLA-IAP
  Organization: HKUST / CUHK / South China Normal University / NUDT / USTB
  Date: 2026-03-24
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22991
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: training-free visual token pruning (applied to OpenVLA-OFT, pi0, pi0.5, DreamVLA)
    Backbone: None
    LLM: None
    Parameters: N/A (framework, not a model)
  Tags: token-pruning, training-free, efficiency, speedup, multi-VLA, libero
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=97.8): libero_spatial=97.6, libero_object=99.6, libero_goal=98.4, libero_long=95.6
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned (OpenVLA-OFT base)'}
  AI Review Summary: Geometric prior (Sobel edge) + semantic prior (cross-modal attention) + motion prior (temporal difference)лҘј кІ°н•©н•ң training-free token pruningмңјлЎң, OpenVLA-OFTм—җм„ң LIBERO **97.8%** (baseline 97.1%) at **1.25Г— speedup**, мөңлҢҖ **1.54Г— at 30% retention**.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

MODEL: DreamVLA
  Organization: Shanghai AI Lab / Fudan University / NUS
  Date: 2025-07-06

  Open Source: True

    Backbone: PrismaticVLM (SigLIP + DinoV2)
    LLM: Llama-2 7B

  Tags: 7B, world-knowledge-forecasting, inverse-dynamics, open-source

  AI Review: PDF-verified

MODEL: AtomicVLA
  Organization: Sun Yat-sen University / Peng Cheng Laboratory / Yinwang Intelligent Technology
  Date: 2026-03-08
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07648
  Code: https://github.com/zhanglk9/AtomicVLA
  Venue: CVPR2026
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: Skill-Guided MoE (SG-MoE)
    Backbone: PaliGemma (SigLIP + Gemma 2B, via pi0)
    LLM: Gemma 2B
    Parameters: 4.17B
  Tags: libero, calvin, CVPR2026, open-source
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=96.6): libero_long=95.2, libero_avg=96.6
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: ПҖвӮҖ foundation model мң„м—җ Skill-Guided MoE (SG-MoE)лҘј кө¬м¶•н•ҳм—¬, atomic skill лӢЁмң„мқҳ expert routingмңјлЎң long-horizon нғңмҠӨнҒ¬м—җм„ң ПҖвӮҖ.вӮ… лҢҖл№„ +18.3% real-world н–ҘмғҒ, continual learningм—җм„ң catastrophic forgettingмқ„ -1.3%лЎң мөңмҶҢнҷ” (ПҖвӮҖ.вӮ…лҠ” -15%).
  AI Review: PDF-verified

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: MemoryVLA
  Organization: PKU / Tsinghua University / Shanghai AI Lab
  Date: 2025-08-26
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.19236
  Code: https://github.com/shihao1895/MemoryVLA
  Venue: ICLR 2026
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: diffusion transformer conditioned on memory-augmented tokens
    Backbone: PrismaticVLM (SigLIP + DinoV2)
    LLM: Llama-2 7B
    Parameters: 7B
  Tags: 7B, memory, temporal-context, long-horizon, ICLR-2026, open-source, diffusion-transformer
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=96.5): libero_5_suite_avg=96.5
    simpler_env: simpler_bridge=71.9, simpler_fractal=72.7
  Eval Conditions: {'simpler_env': 'fine-tuned', 'libero': 'fine-tuned'}
  Peer Review:
    Venue: ICLR 2026, Decision: poster
    Review Avg: 4.5, Confidence: 4.25

    simpler_env: google_robot_pick_coke_can=78.4, google_robot_move_near=62.3
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned', 'simpler_env': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: DINOv2+SigLIP vision encoderмҷҖ LLaMA-2 backboneмңјлЎң "cognition feature"лҘј м¶”м¶ңн•ҳкі , лі„лҸ„мқҳ Diffusion Transformer (DiT) action moduleлЎң actionмқ„ мғқм„ұн•ҳлҠ” componentized VLAлЎң, OpenVLA лҢҖл№„ +35%p (sim), +59%p (real) н–ҘмғҒмқ„ 7.6BлЎң лӢ¬м„ұн•ҳкі  action head scaling lawлҘј мӢӨмҰқ.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

MODEL: DeeR-VLA
  Organization: Tsinghua University / Shanghai AI Lab
  Date: 2024-11-04

  Architecture:

    LLM: MPT-1B

  Tags: 3B, dynamic-inference, early-exit, efficient, open-source
  Eval Conditions: {'calvin': 'fine-tuned (dynamic inference)'}
  AI Review Summary: OpenFlamingo (3B/9B) кё°л°ҳ MLLMм—җ multi-exit кө¬мЎ°лҘј м¶”к°Җн•ҳм—¬, action consistency кё°л°ҳ early-exitмңјлЎң LLM GFLOPsлҘј **2.5-5.2x м Ҳк°җ** (Table 2: 31.2вҶ’10.0~12.5 GFLOPs, Table 5 best: 31.2вҶ’6.0), мӢӨм ң latency **68.1% к°җмҶҢ** (55вҶ’17.5ms)н•ҳл©ҙм„ң CALVIN м„ұлҠҘ мң м§Җ(4.08 vs 4.07).
  AI Review: PDF-verified

  AI Review Summary: Long-context VLMкіј topological graph кё°л°ҳ м ңм–ҙлҘј кІ°н•©н•ң кі„мёөм Ғ navigation мӢңмҠӨн…ңмңјлЎң, мһҗм—°м–ҙ+мқҙлҜём§Җ multimodal м§ҖмӢңлҘј мқҙн•ҙн•ҳм—¬ мӢӨм ң нҷҳкІҪм—җм„ң лЎңлҙҮ navigation мҲҳн–ү.
  AI Review: Abstract-based

MODEL: Motus
  Organization: Tsinghua University / Peking University / Horizon Robotics
  Date: 2025-12-25
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.13030
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: transformer action expert (30 layers, 641.5M)
    Backbone: Mixture-of-Transformers (Wan 2.2 5B video + Qwen3-VL-2B)
    LLM: Qwen3-VL-2B
    Parameters: ~8B (VGM 5.0B + VLM 2.13B + Action 641.5M + Understanding 253.5M)
  Tags: world-action-model, MoT, latent-action, optical-flow, cross-embodiment
  Benchmarks:
    libero: libero_long=97.6
    robotwin_v2 (avg=87.84): robotwin_v2_easy_avg=88.66, robotwin_v2_hard_avg=87.02
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned', 'robotwin_v2': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: Latent action spaceм—җм„ңмқҳ нҶөн•© world modelлЎң, кё°мЎҙ pretrained modelкіј motion informationмқ„ кІ°н•©н•ҳлҠ” Mixture-of-Transformer м•„нӮӨн…ҚмІҳлҘј нҶөн•ҙ video prediction, action prediction, planningмқ„ мң м—°н•ҳкІҢ мҲҳн–ү.

================================================================================
SECTION 3: BENCHMARK DEFINITIONS
================================================================================

LIBERO: 4 manipulation suites (Spatial, Object, Goal, Long-horizon)
  Score range: 0-100% success rate. Higher is better.
  Primary ranking metric for VLA-Tracker.

CALVIN: Long-horizon language-conditioned manipulation (ABCвҶ’D setting)
  Score: Average number of tasks completed in sequence (0-5). Higher is better.

SimplerEnv: Sim-to-real transfer evaluation
  Score range: 0-100% success rate. Higher is better.

RoboTwin v1/v2: Bimanual dual-arm manipulation (50+ tasks)
  Score range: 0-100% success rate. Higher is better.

RLBench: Diverse manipulation tasks (18 tasks)
  Score range: 0-100% success rate. Higher is better.

RoboCasa: Home robot manipulation tasks
  Score range: 0-100% success rate. Higher is better.

================================================================================
END OF FILE
Total: 89 models, 39 with LIBERO scores
================================================================================
